properties.description: Full extract of active CRM customers from SQL Server to ADLS Gen2 Parquet. Migrated from Extract_CRM_Customers.dtsx which truncated staging.CRMCustomers, then used OLE DB Source querying dbo.Customers WHERE IsActive = 1, Derived Column for FullName and ExtractTimestamp, and OLE DB Destination.

activities.name: CopyCRMCustomersFull
activities.description: Full copy of active customers from CRM SQL Server to ADLS Gen2 Parquet (replaces SSIS Truncate + Data Flow pattern; ADF overwrites the partition folder each run)

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT CustomerID, FirstName, LastName, CONCAT(FirstName, ' ', LastName) AS FullName, Email, Phone, Address, City, State, ZipCode, Country, LoyaltyTier, LoyaltyPoints, Segment, CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate, IsActive, GETDATE() AS ExtractTimestamp FROM dbo.Customers WHERE IsActive = 1
